info.title: BERSn Backend API
info.description:
桃園市建築物能源設計平台 (Taoyuan Building Energy Design Platform)

All protected endpoints require a valid `bersn_access_token` cookie (set automatically on login). The token auto-refreshes via `bersn_refresh_token`.

tags.name: projects
tags.description: Project CRUD, workspace settings, geometry preview

get.description: Returns ok:true if the Express server is up and PostgreSQL responds.

post.description: Runs backend Python engine to calculate EEI reduction and cost for given measures/scenario.

200.description: Login successful. Sets bersn_access_token + bersn_refresh_token cookies.

post.description: Uses the bersn_refresh_token cookie to issue a new access token. Called automatically by requireAuth middleware.

post.summary: Logout — revoke session and clear cookies

new_password.description: Min 12 chars, must not contain username

200.description: Password changed. is_first_login set to false.

get.summary: List organizations visible to current user

201.description: Project created with starter geometry auto-generated

get.summary: Get single project (includes starter geometry for new projects)

patch.summary: Update project name / location / building type
Assign project to a user (SYS_ADMIN only)
Auto-save full workspace state (envelope, MEP, floors)
patch.description: Called automatically every 600 ms when any workspace parameter changes. Persists floors (JSONB), geometry, envelope and MEP selections.

post.summary: Run geometry preview — returns EEI, Grade, wall/window areas, renderParams
post.description: Spawns Python BERSn calculation engine. Returns performance KPIs (EEI, ESR, grade) and renderParams.objects with shadingType/glassType injected for 3D visualization.

200.description: Preview result with EEI, Grade, render params

renderParams.description: Objects with shadingType and glassType injected for ThreeDViewer

get.summary: List calculation history for a project

post.description: Stores EEI, grade and full workspace snapshot. Grade must use BERS 7-level scale (1+, 1, 2, …, 7).

201.description: Calculation created with full workspace snapshot

400.description: Invalid grade (must be BERS 7-level, not GOLD/SILVER/BRONZE)

patch.summary: Activate or deactivate a user (SYS_ADMIN only)

get.summary: Glazing types with Ug and ηi
